title: ranunculus fascicularis var. cuneiformis
intro: Ranunculus fascicularis var. cuneiformis, commonly known as the slender buttercup, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Ranunculaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, due to the presence of alkaloids and glycosides. The health benefits of Ranunculus fascicularis var. cuneiformis include its potential to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and treat skin irritations. The plant is typically prepared as a herbal remedy through infusion, decoction, or tincture, although its use should be approached with caution due to its toxicity.
